verses.latin_vulgate: Cum autem habitaret David in domo sua, dixit ad Nathan prophetam : Ecce ego habito in domo cedrina : arca autem fœderis Domini sub pellibus est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֕י כַּאֲשֶׁ֛ר יָשַׁ֥ב דָּוִ֖יד בְּבֵית֑וֹ וַיֹּ֨אמֶר דָּוִ֜יד אֶל־נָתָ֣ן הַנָּבִ֗יא הִנֵּ֨ה אָנֹכִ֤י יוֹשֵׁב֙ בְּבֵ֣ית הָאֲרָזִ֔ים וַאֲר֥וֹן בְּרִית־יְהֹוָ֖ה תַּ֥חַת יְרִיעֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now when David was dwelling in his house, he said to Nathan the prophet: Behold I dwell in a house of cedar: and the ark of the covenant of the Lord is under skins.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja tapahtui, kuin David asui huoneessansa, sanoi hän propheta Natanille: katso, minä asun sedrihuoneessa, ja Herran liitonarkki on vaatetten alla.
verses.king_james: Now it came to pass, as David sat in his house, that David said to Nathan the prophet, Lo, I dwell in an house of cedars, but the ark of the covenant of the Lord remaineth under curtains.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ait Nathan ad David : Omnia quæ in corde tuo sunt, fac : Deus enim tecum est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר נָתָן֙ אֶל־דָּוִ֔יד כֹּ֛ל אֲשֶׁ֥ר בִּֽלְבָבְךָ֖ עֲשֵׂ֑ה כִּ֥י הָאֱלֹהִ֖ים עִמָּֽךְ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And Nathan said to David: Do all that is in thy heart: for God is with thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Natan sanoi Davidille: kaikki mikä sinun sydämessäs on, tee, sillä Herra on sinun kanssas.
verses.king_james: Then Nathan said unto David, Do all that is in thine heart; for God is with thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Igitur nocte illa factus est sermo Dei ad Nathan, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֖י בַּלַּ֣יְלָה הַה֑וּא וַֽיְהִי֙ דְּבַר־אֱלֹהִ֔ים אֶל־נָתָ֖ן לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now that night the word of God came to Nathan, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta sinä yönä tuli Jumalan sana Natanin tykö ja sanoi:
verses.king_james: And it came to pass the same night, that the word of God came to Nathan, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Vade, et loquere David servo meo : Hæc dicit Dominus : Non ædificabis tu mihi domum ad habitandum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֵ֤ךְ וְאָֽמַרְתָּ֙ אֶל־דָּוִ֣יד עַבְדִּ֔י כֹּ֖ה אָמַ֣ר יְהֹוָ֑ה לֹ֥א אַתָּ֛ה תִּבְנֶה־לִּ֥י הַבַּ֖יִת לָשָֽׁבֶת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Go, and speak to David my servant: Thus saith the Lord: Thou shalt not build me a house to dwell in.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mene ja sano palvelialleni Davidille: näin sanoo Herra: ei sinun pidä minulle rakentaman huonetta asuakseni;
verses.king_james: Go and tell David my servant, Thus saith the Lord, Thou shalt not build me an house to dwell in:

verses.latin_vulgate: Neque enim mansi in domo ex eo tempore quo eduxi Israël usque ad diem hanc : sed fui semper mutans loca tabernaculi, et in tentorio
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י לֹ֤א יָשַׁ֙בְתִּי֙ בְּבַ֔יִת מִן־הַיּ֗וֹם אֲשֶׁ֤ר הֶעֱלֵ֙יתִי֙ אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל עַ֖ד הַיּ֣וֹם הַזֶּ֑ה וָאֶהְיֶ֛ה מֵאֹ֥הֶל אֶל־אֹ֖הֶל וּמִמִּשְׁכָּֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: For I have not remained in a house from the time that I brought up Israel, to this day: but I have been always changing places in a tabernacle, and in a tent,
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä en minä ole asunut yhdessäkään huoneessa siitä päivästä, kuin minä Israelin lapset johdatin ulos, tähän päivään asti, vaan minä olen aina ollut majoissa ja tabernaklissa.
verses.king_james: For I have not dwelt in an house since the day that I brought up Israel unto this day; but have gone from tent to tent, and from one tabernacle to another.

verses.latin_vulgate: manens cum omni Israël. Numquid locutus sum saltem uni judicum Israël, quibus præceperam ut pascerent populum meum, et dixi : Quare non ædificastis mihi domum cedrinam ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּכֹ֥ל אֲשֶֽׁר־הִתְהַלַּ֘כְתִּי֮ בְּכׇל־יִשְׂרָאֵל֒ הֲדָבָ֣ר דִּבַּ֗רְתִּי אֶת־אַחַד֙ שֹׁפְטֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל אֲשֶׁ֥ר צִוִּ֛יתִי לִרְע֥וֹת אֶת־עַמִּ֖י לֵאמֹ֑ר לָ֛מָּה לֹא־בְנִיתֶ֥ם לִ֖י בֵּ֥ית אֲרָזִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: Abiding with all Israel. Did I ever speak to any one, of all the judges of Israel whom I charged to feed my people, saying: Why have you not built me a house of cedar?
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuhunka ikänä minä vaelsin koko Israelissa, olenko minä puhutellut jotakuta tuomaria Israelissa, jonka minä olen käskenyt kaita minun kansaani, ja sanonut: miksi ette ole minulle rakentaneet sedrihuonetta?
verses.king_james: Wheresoever I have walked with all Israel, spake I a word to any of the judges of Israel, whom I commanded to feed my people, saying, Why have ye not built me an house of cedars?

verses.latin_vulgate: Nunc itaque sic loqueris ad servum meum David : Hæc dicit Dominus exercituum : Ego tuli te, cum in pascuis sequereris gregem, ut esses dux populi mei Israël :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְ֠עַתָּ֠ה כֹּֽה־תֹאמַ֞ר לְעַבְדִּ֣י לְדָוִ֗יד {ס} כֹּ֤ה אָמַר֙ יְהֹוָ֣ה צְבָא֔וֹת אֲנִ֤י לְקַחְתִּ֙יךָ֙ מִן־הַנָּוֶ֔ה מִֽן־אַחֲרֵ֖י הַצֹּ֑אן לִֽהְי֣וֹת נָגִ֔יד עַ֖ל עַמִּ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now therefore thus shalt thou say to my servant David: Thus saith the Lord of hosts: I took thee from the pastures, from following the flock, that thou shouldst be ruler of my people Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin sano nyt näin palvelialleni Davidille: näin sanoo Herra Zebaot: minä olen ottanut sinun kedolta, kussas lampaita kaitsit, kansani Israelin päämieheksi,
verses.king_james: Now therefore thus shalt thou say unto my servant David, Thus saith the Lord of hosts, I took thee from the sheepcote, even from following the sheep, that thou shouldest be ruler over my people Israel:

verses.latin_vulgate: et fui tecum quocumque perrexisti, et interfeci omnes inimicos tuos coram te, fecique tibi nomen quasi unius magnorum qui celebrantur in terra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֶהְיֶ֣ה עִמְּךָ֗ בְּכֹל֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר הָלַ֔כְתָּ וָאַכְרִ֥ית אֶת־כׇּל־אוֹיְבֶ֖יךָ מִפָּנֶ֑יךָ וְעָשִׂ֤יתִֽי לְךָ֙ שֵׁ֔ם כְּשֵׁ֥ם הַגְּדוֹלִ֖ים אֲשֶׁ֥ר בָּאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I have been with thee whithersoever thou hast gone: and have slain all thy enemies before thee, and have made thee a name like that of one of the great ones that are renowned in the earth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja olen ollut sinun kanssas, kuhunkas ikänä vaelsit, ja olen hävittänyt kaikki vihamiehes edestäs, ja olen tehnyt sinulle nimen, niiden suurten nimien jälkeen, jotka maan päällä ovat;
verses.king_james: And I have been with thee whithersoever thou hast walked, and have cut off all thine enemies from before thee, and have made thee a name like the name of the great men that are in the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dedi locum populo meo Israël : plantabitur, et habitabit in eo, et ultra non commovebitur : nec filii iniquitatis atterent eos, sicut a principio,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשַׂמְתִּ֣י מָ֠ק֠וֹם לְעַמִּ֨י יִשְׂרָאֵ֤ל וּנְטַעְתִּ֙יהוּ֙ וְשָׁכַ֣ן תַּחְתָּ֔יו וְלֹ֥א יִרְגַּ֖ז ע֑וֹד וְלֹֽא־יוֹסִ֤יפוּ בְנֵֽי־עַוְלָה֙ לְבַלֹּת֔וֹ כַּאֲשֶׁ֖ר בָּרִאשׁוֹנָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I have given a place my people Israel: they shall be planted, and shall dwell therein, and shall be moved no more, neither shall the children of iniquity waste them, as at the beginning,
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta minä panen kansalleni Israelille paikan ja istutan sen niin, että se siinä asuu ja ei enään liikuteta, ja pahan kansan ei pidä enää sitä vaivaaman niinkuin ennen.
verses.king_james: Also I will ordain a place for my people Israel, and will plant them, and they shall dwell in their place, and shall be moved no more; neither shall the children of wickedness waste them any more, as at the beginning,

verses.latin_vulgate: ex diebus quibus dedi judices populo meo Israël, et humiliavi universos inimicos tuos. Annuntio ergo tibi, quod ædificaturus sit tibi Dominus domum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּלְמִיָּמִ֗ים אֲשֶׁ֨ר צִוִּ֤יתִי שֹֽׁפְטִים֙ עַל־עַמִּ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל וְהִכְנַ֖עְתִּי אֶת־כׇּל־אוֹיְבֶ֑יךָ וָאַגִּ֣ד לָ֔ךְ וּבַ֖יִת יִֽבְנֶה־לְּךָ֥ יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Since the days that I gave judges to my people Israel, and have humbled all thy enemies. And I declare to thee, that the Lord will build thee a house.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja siitä ajasta, jona minä asetin tuomarit kansalleni Israelille, painoin minä kaikki sinun vihamiehes alas: ja minä ilmoitan sinulle Herran rakentavan sinulle huoneen.
verses.king_james: And since the time that I commanded judges to be over my people Israel. Moreover I will subdue all thine enemies. Furthermore I tell thee that the Lord will build thee an house.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque impleveris dies tuos ut vadas ad patres tuos, suscitabo semen tuum post te, quod erit de filiis tuis : et stabiliam regnum ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֗ה כִּֽי־מָלְא֤וּ יָמֶ֙יךָ֙ לָלֶ֣כֶת עִם־אֲבֹתֶ֔יךָ וַהֲקִימוֹתִ֤י אֶֽת־זַרְעֲךָ֙ אַחֲרֶ֔יךָ אֲשֶׁ֥ר יִהְיֶ֖ה מִבָּנֶ֑יךָ וַהֲכִינוֹתִ֖י אֶת־מַלְכוּתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when thou shalt have ended thy days to go to thy fathers, I will raise up thy seed after thee, which shall be of thy sons: and I will establish his kingdom.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja pitää tapahtuman, kuin sinun aikas on täytetty, että sinä menet isäis tykö, niin minä herätän sinun siemenes sinun jälkees, joka pitää oleman sinun pojistas, ja minä vahvistan hänen valtakuntansa.
verses.king_james: And it shall come to pass, when thy days be expired that thou must go to be with thy fathers, that I will raise up thy seed after thee, which shall be of thy sons; and I will establish his kingdom.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ipse ædificabit mihi domum, et firmabo solium ejus usque in æternum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ה֥וּא יִבְנֶה־לִּ֖י בָּ֑יִת וְכֹנַנְתִּ֥י אֶת־כִּסְא֖וֹ עַד־עוֹלָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: He shall build me a house, and I will establish his throne for ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän rakentaa minulle huoneen, ja minä vahvistan hänen istuimensa ijankaikkisesti.
verses.king_james: He shall build me an house, and I will stablish his throne for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego ero ei in patrem, et ipse erit mihi in filium : et misericordiam meam non auferam ab eo, sicut abstuli ab eo qui ante te fuit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲנִי֙ אֶֽהְיֶה־לּ֣וֹ לְאָ֔ב וְה֖וּא יִֽהְיֶה־לִּ֣י לְבֵ֑ן וְחַסְדִּי֙ לֹא־אָסִ֣יר מֵעִמּ֔וֹ כַּאֲשֶׁ֣ר הֲסִיר֔וֹתִי מֵאֲשֶׁ֥ר הָיָ֖ה לְפָנֶֽיךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: I will be to him a father, and he shall be to me a son: and I will not take my mercy away from him, as I took it from him that was before thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä olen hänen isänsä, ja hän on minun poikani: ja en minä käännä laupiuttani häneltä pois, niinkuin minä sen käänsin häneltä pois, joka sinun edelläs oli;
verses.king_james: I will be his father, and he shall be my son: and I will not take my mercy away from him, as I took it from him that was before thee:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et statuam eum in domo mea, et in regno meo usque in sempiternum : et thronus ejus erit firmissimus in perpetuum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַעֲמַדְתִּ֛יהוּ בְּבֵיתִ֥י וּבְמַלְכוּתִ֖י עַד־הָעוֹלָ֑ם וְכִסְא֕וֹ יִהְיֶ֥ה נָכ֖וֹן עַד־עוֹלָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: But I will settle him in my house, and in my kingdom for ever: and his throne shall be most firm for ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta minä asetan hänen minun huoneeseni ja valtakuntaani ijankaikkisesti, niin että hänen istuimensa on pysyväinen ijankaikkisesti.
verses.king_james: But I will settle him in mine house and in my kingdom for ever: and his throne shall be established for evermore.

verses.latin_vulgate: Juxta omnia verba hæc, et juxta universam visionem istam, sic locutus est Nathan ad David.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כְּכֹל֙ הַדְּבָרִ֣ים הָאֵ֔לֶּה וּכְכֹ֖ל הֶחָז֣וֹן הַזֶּ֑ה כֵּ֛ן דִּבֶּ֥ר נָתָ֖ן אֶל־דָּוִֽיד׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: According to all these words, and according to all this vision, so did Nathan speak to David.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin Natan kaikkein näiden sanain jälkeen ja kaiken tämän näyn jälkeen Davidin kanssa puhunut oli,
verses.king_james: According to all these words, and according to all this vision, so did Nathan speak unto David.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque venisset rex David, et sedisset coram Domino, dixit : Quis ego sum, Domine Deus, et quæ domus mea, ut præstares mihi talia ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבֹא֙ הַמֶּ֣לֶךְ דָּוִ֔יד וַיֵּ֖שֶׁב לִפְנֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה וַיֹּ֗אמֶר מִֽי־אֲנִ֞י יְהֹוָ֤ה אֱלֹהִים֙ וּמִ֣י בֵיתִ֔י כִּ֥י הֲבִיאֹתַ֖נִי עַד־הֲלֹֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And king David came and sat before the Lord, and said: Who am I, O Lord God, and what is my house, that thou shouldst give such things to me?
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin tuli kuningas David ja oli Herran edessä, ja sanoi: kuka olen minä, Herra Jumala? ja mikä on minun huoneeni, ettäs olet saattanut minun tähän asti?
verses.king_james: And David the king came and sat before the Lord, and said, Who am I, O Lord God, and what is mine house, that thou hast brought me hitherto?

verses.latin_vulgate: sed et hoc parum visum est in conspectu tuo, ideoque locutus es super domum servi tui etiam in futurum : et fecisti me spectabilem super omnes homines, Domine Deus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתִּקְטַ֨ן זֹ֤את בְּעֵינֶ֙יךָ֙ אֱלֹהִ֔ים וַתְּדַבֵּ֥ר עַל־בֵּֽית־עַבְדְּךָ֖ לְמֵרָח֑וֹק וּרְאִיתַ֗נִי כְּת֧וֹר הָאָדָ֛ם הַֽמַּעֲלָ֖ה יְהֹוָ֥ה אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: But even this hath seemed little in thy sight, and therefore thou hast also spoken concerning the house of thy servant for the time to come: and hast made me remarkable above all men, O Lord God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja tämä on vähä ollut sinun silmäis edessä, Jumala, mutta sinä olet myös puhunut sinun palvelias huoneelle kaukaisista asioista, ja olet katsellut minun niinkuin ihmisen hahmossa, joka on Herra Jumala korkeudessa.
verses.king_james: And yet this was a small thing in thine eyes, O God; for thou hast also spoken of thy servant’s house for a great while to come, and hast regarded me according to the estate of a man of high degree, O Lord God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quid ultra addere potest David, cum ita glorificaveris servum tuum, et cognoveris eum ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַה־יּוֹסִ֨יף ע֥וֹד דָּוִ֛יד אֵלֶ֖יךָ לְכָב֣וֹד אֶת־עַבְדֶּ֑ךָ וְאַתָּ֖ה אֶֽת־עַבְדְּךָ֥ יָדָֽעְתָּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: What can David add more, seeing thou hast thus glorified thy servant, and known him?
verses.finnish_biblia: Mitä enempää David mahtaa anoa sinulta, ettäs kunnioittaisit palvelias? sillä sinä tunnet palvelias.
verses.king_james: What can David speak more to thee for the honour of thy servant? for thou knowest thy servant.

verses.latin_vulgate: Domine, propter famulum tuum juxta cor tuum fecisti omnem magnificentiam hanc, et nota esse voluisti universa magnalia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהֹוָ֕ה בַּעֲב֤וּר עַבְדְּךָ֙ וּֽכְלִבְּךָ֔ עָשִׂ֕יתָ אֵ֥ת כׇּל־הַגְּדוּלָּ֖ה הַזֹּ֑את לְהֹדִ֖יעַ אֶת־כׇּל־הַגְּדֻלּֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: O Lord, for thy servant's sake, according to thy own heart, thou hast shewn all this magnificence, and wouldst have all the great things to be known.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra, palvelias tähden ja sinun sydämes jälkeen olet sinä kaikki nämät suuret asiat tehnyt, ilmoittaakses kaikki ne suuret työt.
verses.king_james: O Lord, for thy servant’s sake, and according to thine own heart, hast thou done all this greatness, in making known all these great things.

verses.latin_vulgate: Domine, non est similis tui, et non est alius deus absque te, ex omnibus quos audivimus auribus nostris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהֹוָה֙ אֵ֣ין כָּמ֔וֹךָ וְאֵ֥ין אֱלֹהִ֖ים זוּלָתֶ֑ךָ בְּכֹ֥ל אֲשֶׁר־שָׁמַ֖עְנוּ בְּאׇזְנֵֽינוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: O Lord there is none like thee: and here is no other God beside thee, of all whom we have heard of with our ears.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra, ei ole sinun kaltaistas ja ei ole Jumalaa paitsi sinua, kaiken senjälkeen, minkä me korvillamme kuulleet olemme.
verses.king_james: O Lord, there is none like thee, neither is there any God beside thee, according to all that we have heard with our ears.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quis enim est alius, ut populus tuus Israël, gens una in terra, ad quam perrexit Deus ut liberaret et faceret populum sibi, et magnitudine sua atque terroribus ejiceret nationes a facie ejus, quem de Ægypto liberarat ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִי֙ כְּעַמְּךָ֣ יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל גּ֥וֹי אֶחָ֖ד בָּאָ֑רֶץ אֲשֶׁר֩ הָלַ֨ךְ הָאֱלֹהִ֜ים לִפְדּ֧וֹת ל֣וֹ עָ֗ם לָשׂ֤וּם לְךָ֙ שֵׁ֚ם גְּדֻלּ֣וֹת וְנֹרָא֔וֹת לְגָרֵ֗שׁ מִפְּנֵ֧י עַמְּךָ֛ אֲשֶׁר־פָּדִ֥יתָ מִמִּצְרַ֖יִם גּוֹיִֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: For what other nation is there upon earth like thy people Israel, whom God went to deliver, and make a people for himself, and by his greatness and terrors cast out nations before their face whom he had delivered out of Egypt?
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja mikä kansa maan päällä on niinkuin kansas Israel, jota Jumala mennyt on vapahtamaan itsellensä kansaksi, ja tekemään itsellensä nimeä suurista ja hirmuisista töistä, ajain pakanat ulos kansas edestä, jonkas Egyptistä vapahtanut olet?
verses.king_james: And what one nation in the earth is like thy people Israel, whom God went to redeem to be his own people, to make thee a name of greatness and terribleness, by driving out nations from before thy people, whom thou hast redeemed out of Egypt?

verses.latin_vulgate: Et posuisti populum tuum Israël tibi in populum usque in æternum, et tu, Domine, factus es Deus ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַ֠תִּתֵּ֠ן אֶת־עַמְּךָ֨ יִשְׂרָאֵ֧ל ׀ לְךָ֛ לְעָ֖ם עַד־עוֹלָ֑ם וְאַתָּ֣ה יְהֹוָ֔ה הָיִ֥יתָ לָהֶ֖ם לֵאלֹהִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And thou hast made thy people Israel to be thy own people for ever, and thou, O Lord, art become their God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja olet tehnyt kansas Israelin itselles ijankaikkiseksi kansaksi, ja sinä Herra olet heidän Jumalaksensa tullut.
verses.king_james: For thy people Israel didst thou make thine own people for ever; and thou, Lord, becamest their God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nunc igitur Domine, sermo quem locutus es famulo tuo et super domum ejus confirmetur in perpetuum, et fac sicut locutus es.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַתָּ֣ה יְהֹוָ֔ה הַדָּבָ֗ר אֲשֶׁ֨ר דִּבַּ֤רְתָּ עַֽל־עַבְדְּךָ֙ וְעַל־בֵּית֔וֹ יֵאָמֵ֖ן עַד־עוֹלָ֑ם וַעֲשֵׂ֖ה כַּאֲשֶׁ֥ר דִּבַּֽרְתָּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now therefore, O Lord, let the word which thou hast spoken to thy servant, and concerning his house, be established for ever, and do as thou hast said.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nyt Herra, se sana, jonkas puhunut olet palveliastas ja hänen huoneestansa, vahvistukoon ijankaikkisesti! ja tee niinkuin sinä puhunut olet.
verses.king_james: Therefore now, Lord, let the thing that thou hast spoken concerning thy servant and concerning his house be established for ever, and do as thou hast said.

verses.latin_vulgate: Permaneatque et magnificetur nomen tuum usque in sempiternum, et dicatur : Dominus exercituum Deus Israël, et domus David servi ejus permanens coram eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְ֠יֵאָמֵ֠ן וְיִגְדַּ֨ל שִׁמְךָ֤ עַד־עוֹלָם֙ לֵאמֹ֔ר יְהֹוָ֤ה צְבָאוֹת֙ אֱלֹהֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל אֱלֹהִ֖ים לְיִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וּבֵית־דָּוִ֥יד עַבְדְּךָ֖ נָכ֥וֹן לְפָנֶֽיךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And let thy name remain and be magnified for ever: and let it be said: The Lord of hosts is God of Israel, and the house of David his servant remaineth before him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vahvistukoon ja suureksi tulkoon sinun nimes ijankaikkisesti! että sanottaisiin: Herra Zebaot, Israelin Jumala, on Jumala Israelissa, ja palvelias Davidin huone olkoon pysyväinen sinun edessäs!
verses.king_james: Let it even be established, that thy name may be magnified for ever, saying, The Lord of hosts is the God of Israel, even a God to Israel: and let the house of David thy servant be established before thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tu enim, Domine Deus meus, revelasti auriculam servi tui, ut ædificares ei domum : et idcirco invenit servus tuus fiduciam, ut oret coram te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י ׀ אַתָּ֣ה אֱלֹהַ֗י גָּלִ֙יתָ֙ אֶת־אֹ֣זֶן עַבְדְּךָ֔ לִבְנ֥וֹת ל֖וֹ בָּ֑יִת עַל־כֵּן֙ מָצָ֣א עַבְדְּךָ֔ לְהִתְפַּלֵּ֖ל לְפָנֶֽיךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: For thou, O Lord my God, hast revealed to the ear of thy servant, that thou wilt build him a house: and therefore thy servant hath found confidence to pray before thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä sinä, Jumalani, olet ilmoittanut palvelias korvain kuullen, ettäs rakennat hänelle huoneen, sentähden on palvelias aikonut rukoilla sinun edessäs.
verses.king_james: For thou, O my God, hast told thy servant that thou wilt build him an house: therefore thy servant hath found in his heart to pray before thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nunc ergo Domine, tu es Deus, et locutus es ad servum tuum tanta beneficia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַתָּ֣ה יְהֹוָ֔ה אַתָּה־ה֖וּא הָאֱלֹהִ֑ים וַתְּדַבֵּר֙ עַֽל־עַבְדְּךָ֔ הַטּוֹבָ֖ה הַזֹּֽאת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And now O Lord, thou art God: and thou hast promised to thy servant such great benefits.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nyt Herra, sinä olet Jumala, ja sinä olet tätä hyvää puhunut palvelialles;
verses.king_james: And now, Lord, thou art God, and hast promised this goodness unto thy servant:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et cœpisti benedicere domui servi tui, ut sit semper coram te : te enim, Domine, benedicente, benedicta erit in perpetuum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַתָּ֗ה הוֹאַ֙לְתָּ֙ לְבָרֵךְ֙ אֶת־בֵּ֣ית עַבְדְּךָ֔ לִֽהְי֥וֹת לְעוֹלָ֖ם לְפָנֶ֑יךָ כִּֽי־אַתָּ֤ה יְהֹוָה֙ בֵּרַ֔כְתָּ וּמְבֹרָ֖ךְ לְעוֹלָֽם׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And thou hast begun to bless the house of thy servant, that it may be always before thee: for seeing thou blessest it, O Lord, it shall be blessed for ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin rupee nyt siunaamaan palvelias huonetta, että se pysyis ijankaikkisesti sinun edessäs; sillä sinä Herra olet siunannut sen, niin olkoon se siunattu ijankaikkisesti!
verses.king_james: Now therefore let it please thee to bless the house of thy servant, that it may be before thee for ever: for thou blessest, O Lord, and it shall be blessed for ever.
